milestones.title: Further reduce Haiku 4.5 synthesis time in async Lambda (currently 23.4s avg)
milestones.quickPrompt: Check CLAUDE.md Known Issues for current avg latency. Try: (1) streaming the Lambda response instead of waiting for full completion, (2) reducing the system prompt token count by another 20%, (3) parallelizing the KB retrieve and tool-list build. Measure with CloudWatch Logs Insights query: fields @timestamp, @duration | filter @message like /synthesis/ | stats avg(@duration) by bin(1h)
